name: VoiceChannels
description: Creates a dashboard that lets members create and manage temporary voice channels on demand.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: VoiceChannels loaded! Use `[p]voicechannels setup <dashboard_channel> [category]` to post the creation dashboard. Members can use dashboard buttons to create and manage their temporary voice channel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores configured dashboard/category channel IDs, temporary voice channel IDs, creator IDs, trusted user IDs, blocked user IDs, privacy state, and linked text channel IDs. It does not store voice audio or message content.
